title: Incorrect result on a LEFT JOIN when using an index
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(x INTEGER NOT NULL, y TEXT DEFAULT 'default');
CREATE TABLE t2(y INTEGER, z TEXT);
CREATE INDEX t2i ON t2(y, COALESCE(z, 'default'));
SELECT COALESCE(z, '!!!') FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON (x=y);
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN result differs with and without index
